ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the movie */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie poster */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Movie rating (G, PG, PG-13, etc.) */,
  "awards" TEXT /* JSON object to store information about awards won by the movie */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie trailer */,
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production company */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the movie was produced */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the movie */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the movie information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_production_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("production_company_id") REFERENCES production_companies ("production_company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director_id FOREIGN KEY ("director_id") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the director was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the director information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent genre */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the genre was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the genre information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genres_parent_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, pending, rejected) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the user's review */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the review was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the review information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "production_company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the production company */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the production company was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the production company information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, moderator, regular user) */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies available */,
  "low_stock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold for low stock alerts */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the sale record was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the sale record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
